title: Rubius Horizons - Resource Pack
description: This is the Resource Pack for the "Horizons" series from the streamer Rubius.
body:
Credits:
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/

This is the Resource Pack for the "Horizons" series from the streamer Rubius.

It changes things in the gameplay as well as adding a new custom menu for the series, splash texts, new dialogs for the tree made for the series and balances for mods or modifications of them.

[HORIZONS - Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/horizons1)

![Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/daa4807af8bf44fc398eecd8e0de91ba9d0559d9.jpeg)

Changed mods:
- [Torches 'n' Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/torches-n-trinkets) By **goremann**
- [Mystical Oak Tree](https://modrinth.com/mod/mystical-oak-tree) By **Plantkillable**
